abilities.description: Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy.Upgraded: Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy. (This spell costs less.)

abilities.description: Gain +10% dodge chance. Disable this spell if you have more than 65% dodge chance.Upgraded: Gain +15% dodge chance. Disable this spell if you have more than 80% dodge chance.

translation.ru_description:
+10% Уклонения.
Отключается, если уклонение выше 65%.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
+15% Уклонения.
Отключается, если уклонение выше 80%.
translation.en_description:
Gain +10% dodge chance.
Disable this spell if you have more than 65% dodge chance.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Gain +15% dodge chance. 
Disable this spell if you have more than 80% dodge chance.

abilities.description: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage and ignore shield.Upgraded: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage, ignore shield, and inflict Bleed and Poison.

translation.ru_description: До конца хода удары в спину на 75% сильнее и игнорируют щит.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: До конца хода удары в спину на 75% сильнее, игнорируют щит, дают Кровотечение и Яд.
translation.en_description: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage and ignore shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage, ignore shield, and inflict Bleed and Poison.

abilities.description: Move up to 3 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.Upgraded: Move up to 5 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.

translation.ru_description: Пройдите до 3 клеток, рассыпая битое стекло по пути.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Пройдите до 5 клеток, рассыпая битое стекло по пути.
translation.en_description: Move up to 3 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Move up to 5 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.

abilities.description: Gain temporary +5 Luck until your next turn.Upgraded: Gain temporary +10 Luck until your next turn.

translation.ru_description: Временно получите +5 [img:lck] до след. хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Временно получите +10 [img:lck] до след. хода.
translation.en_description: Gain temporary +5 [img:lck] until your next turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain temporary +10 [img:lck] until your next turn.

abilities.description: Make a unit face away from you.Upgraded: Make any unit look away from you. This has a 33% chance to inflict Confusion.

translation.ru_description: Заставьте юнита отвернуться от вас.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Заставьте любого юнита отвернуться. 33% шанс Замешательства.
translation.en_description: Make a unit face away from you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Make any unit look away from you. This has a 33% chance to inflict Confusion.

abilities.description: Spawn 2-3 coins on random tiles.Upgraded: Spawn 3-7 coins on random tiles.

translation.ru_description: Создайте 2-3 монеты на случайных клетках.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создайте 3-7 монет на случайных клетках.
translation.en_description: Spawn 2-3 coins on random tiles.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn 3-7 coins on random tiles.

abilities.description: Gain Stealth 1.Upgraded: Gain Stealth 2.

translation.ru_description: Получите Скрытность 1.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите Скрытность 2.
translation.en_description: Gain Stealth 1.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain Stealth 2.

abilities.description: Teleport to a tile with coins on it.Upgraded: Teleport to a tile with coins on it, then spawn 1-2 coins on random tiles.

translation.ru_description: Телепортируйтесь на клетку с монетами.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепортируйтесь на клетку с монетами, создайте 1-2 монеты случайно.
translation.en_description: Teleport to a tile with coins on it.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to a tile with coins on it, then spawn 1-2 coins on random tiles.

abilities.description: Inflict Confusion 1 on each adjacent unit.Upgraded: Inflict Confusion 1 on each unit within 3 tiles of you.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Замешательство 1 всем в радиусе 3.
translation.en_description: Inflict Confusion 1 on each adjacent unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Confusion 1 on each unit within 3 tiles of you.

abilities.description: Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else? (This might destroy the body) Upgraded: Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else? (This might not destroy the body) (Your chance of finding "something else" is significantly increased.)

translation.ru_description:
Снимите 1-3 монеты с трупа... и может что-то еще?
[s:.7](Это может уничтожить тело)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Снимите 1-3 монеты с трупа... и может что-то еще?
[s:.7](Это может не уничтожить тело)[/s]

Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else?
[s:.7](This might destroy the body)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else?
[s:.7](This might not destroy the body)[/s]
[s:.7](Your chance of finding "something else" is significantly increased.)[/s]

abilities.description: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +2 Luck instead of its normal effects.Upgraded: Collect a pickup within four tiles of you. Gain +2 Luck instead of its normal effects.

abilities.description: Swap positions with an ally. Swap back at the end of your turn. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Swap positions with any unit. Swap back at the end of your turn. If the unit was an enemy, inflict Confusion 1. (Castable once per turn.)

Поменяйтесь местами с союзником. В конце хода вернитесь обратно.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Поменяйтесь с любым юнитом. В конце хода вернитесь. Если это враг — Замешательство 1.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]

[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Swap positions with any unit. Swap back at the end of your turn. If the unit was an enemy, inflict Confusion 1.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Steal 1-3 coins from a unit and give it -1 Damage.Upgraded: Steal 3-5 coins from a unit, give it -1 Damage, and apply some extra debuffs at random.

abilities.description: Spend all your mana. For every 5 mana spent, your basic attack inflicts +1 Poison. (Castable once per battle.) Upgraded: Spend all your mana. For every 3 mana spent, your basic attack inflicts +1 Poison. (Castable once per battle.)

translation.en_description:
Target any enemy. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Target any enemy. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. Costs 0 mana.)[/s]

abilities.description: Target any enemy. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Target any enemy. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn. (Castable once per turn. Costs 0 mana.)

translation.ru_description:
Выберите любого врага. В начале след. хода телепортируетесь ему за спину.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Выберите любого врага. В начале след. хода телепортируетесь ему за спину.
[s:.7](Раз за ход. Бесплатно.)[/s]

abilities.description: Take an extra turn at the end of the round. (This spell can't be cast on extra turns.) Upgraded: Take an extra turn at the end of the round. (This spell can't be cast on extra turns. This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description:
Сделайте доп. ход в конце раунда.
[s:.7](Нельзя в доп. ходы.)[/s]

[s:.7](Нельзя в доп. ходы. Стоит дешевле.)[/s]
